title: Telecommunications in French Guiana
content: Telephones – main lines in use: 47,000 (1995) Telephones – mobile cellular: NA Telephone system: <br "domestic:" fair open wire and <a href="microwave" microwave</a radio relay system <br "international:" satellite earth station – 1 Intelsat (Atlantic Ocean) Radio stations: AM 2, FM 14 (including 6 repeaters), shortwave 6 (including 5 repeaters) (1998) Radios: 104,000 (1997) Television stations: 3 (plus eight low-power repeaters) (1997) Televisions: 30,000 (1997) Internet Service Provider s (ISPs): NA Country code (Top-level domain): GF
